{{ dr.label }} {{ dr.tip }} USD
4 · DATA SHARING — set by head office Regions see each other's ratios and aggregates only — unit-level detail stays with the owning region. Head office sees everything. Each region owns its rules above.

{{ arBannerLeft }} {{ arBannerRight }}
Your tug surplus is real and holds into winter — one transfer to approve. The belt loader gap deepens with the new schedule and needs a lease decision before it becomes a coverage incident.
Transfer 4 tugs to SIN — you’re the last approval SIN accepted · Sep 1
surplus 6 of 6 months
Spare tugs held all six months, even at your busiest flight waves, and winter demand still leaves 5 spare. Units TTR-118, -104, -131, -127 · finance notified over the reporting threshold · SIN avoids a ~USD 320k purchase.
or reply to this email — your note goes on the case
Decide belt loader cover — lease 3 for winter
short 3 of 6 months, deepening
Short since April at the evening flight wave · winter adds 2 evening rotations · no station has matching surplus, so a transfer isn’t available.
or reply to this email — your note goes on the case
YOUR QUARTER Equipment efficiency best in the network and improving. Coverage slipped 5 points — all of it the belt loader gap, and decision 2 recovers it before winter.
TRACK RECORD Last review: 2 ACUs to AMS worked — AMS coverage +6 · HLD workshop case still open, 18 days.
